---
title: "Projects & Code"
---

<style>
#category-pills .category-pill {
  color: #6c757d;
  border: solid 1px #dee2e6;
  border-radius: .25rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  font-size: .65em;
  padding-left: .5em;
  padding-right: .5em;
  padding-top: .15em;
  padding-bottom: .15em;
  cursor: pointer;
  margin-right: 4px;
  margin-bottom: 4px;
  transition: all 0.2s ease-in-out;
}
#category-pills .category-pill.active {
  background-color: #6c757d;
  color: white;
  border-color: #6c757d;
}
</style>

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
library(jsonlite)

# 1. Projects Grid
projects <- tryCatch({
  read_json("www/projects.json")
}, error = function(e) list())
civic_pre <- tryCatch({
  read_json("www/civic-engagement.json")
}, error = function(e) list())
opensource_pre <- tryCatch({
  read_json("www/open-source.json")
}, error = function(e) list())

proj_cats <- unique(unlist(lapply(projects, function(x) x$categories)))
civic_cats <- unique(unlist(lapply(civic_pre, function(x) x$keywords)))
os_cats <- unique(unlist(lapply(opensource_pre, function(x) x$keywords)))

all_categories <- unique(c(proj_cats, civic_cats, os_cats))
all_categories <- all_categories[all_categories != ""]
if (length(all_categories) > 0) {
  all_categories <- sort(all_categories)
}

cat('<div class="d-flex flex-wrap mb-4" id="category-pills">\n')
cat('<div class="category-pill active" data-category="all">All</div>\n')
if (length(all_categories) > 0) {
  for (cat in all_categories) {
    cat(sprintf('<div class="category-pill" data-category="%s">%s</div>\n', cat, cat))
  }
}
cat('</div>\n')

cat('<div class="quarto-listing quarto-listing-container-grid" id="listing-listing">\n')
cat('<div class="list grid quarto-listing-cols-3" id="projects-grid">\n')

if (length(projects) > 0) {
  for (i in seq_along(projects)) {
    item <- projects[[i]]
    categories <- item$categories
    if (is.null(categories)) categories <- list()
    
    data_categories_raw <- paste(categories, collapse=",")
    data_categories <- jsonlite::base64_enc(URLencode(data_categories_raw, reserved=TRUE))
    
    cats_html <- ""
    for (cat in categories) {
      escaped_cat <- gsub("'", "\\\\'", cat)
      cats_html <- paste0(cats_html, sprintf('<div class="listing-category" onclick="window.filterProjects(\'%s\'); event.preventDefault(); event.stopPropagation(); return false;" style="cursor:pointer;">%s</div>\n', escaped_cat, cat))
    }
    
    path <- if (!is.null(item$path)) item$path else "#"
    image <- if (!is.null(item$image)) item$image else ""
    title <- if (!is.null(item$title)) item$title else ""
    description <- if (!is.null(item$description)) item$description else ""
    author <- if (!is.null(item$author)) item$author else ""
    
    cat(sprintf('
<div class="g-col-1" data-index="%d" data-categories="%s" data-listing-date-sort="null" data-listing-file-modified-sort="null">
<a href="%s" class="quarto-grid-link" target="_blank">
<div class="quarto-grid-item card h-100 card-left">
<p class="card-img-top">
<img loading="lazy" src="%s" class="thumbnail-image card-img" style="height: 150px;">
</p>
<div class="card-body post-contents">
<h5 class="no-anchor card-title listing-title">
%s
</h5>
<div class="listing-categories">
%s
</div>
<div class="card-text listing-description delink">
<p>%s</p>
</div>
<div class="card-attribution card-text-small start">
<div class="listing-author">
%s
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div></a>
</div>\n', i-1, data_categories, path, image, title, cats_html, description, author))
  }
}

cat('</div>\n')
cat('<div class="listing-no-matching d-none">No matching items</div>\n')
cat('</div>\n')

# 2. Civic Engagement
cat('\n# Civic engagement & open data\n\n')
cat('<div class="quarto-listing quarto-listing-container-default">\n')
cat('<div class="list quarto-listing-default">\n')

tryCatch({
  civic <- read_json("www/civic-engagement.json")
  for (i in seq_along(civic)) {
    item <- civic[[i]]
    url <- if (!is.null(item$url)) item$url else "#"
    title <- if (!is.null(item$title)) item$title else ""
    description <- if (!is.null(item$description)) item$description else ""
    date <- if (!is.null(item$date)) item$date else ""
    details <- if (!is.null(item$details)) item$details else ""
    image <- if (!is.null(item$image)) item$image else ""
    keywords <- if (!is.null(item$keywords)) item$keywords else list()
    
    data_categories_raw <- paste(keywords, collapse=",")
    data_categories <- jsonlite::base64_enc(URLencode(data_categories_raw, reserved=TRUE))
    
    cats_html <- ""
    for (cat in keywords) {
      escaped_cat <- gsub("'", "\\\\'", cat)
      cats_html <- paste0(cats_html, sprintf('<div class="listing-category" onclick="window.filterProjects(\'%s\'); event.preventDefault(); event.stopPropagation(); return false;" style="cursor:pointer;">%s</div>\n', escaped_cat, cat))
    }

    subtitle <- description
    if (details != "") subtitle <- paste0(subtitle, sprintf('<br><blockquote style="margin-top: 0.5rem; color: #666; border-left: 3px solid #ccc; padding-left: 1rem;">%s</blockquote>', details))
    
    target <- if (url != "#") 'target="_blank"' else ''
    
    thumbnail_html <- ""
    image_class <- ""
    if (image != "") {
      image_class <- " image-left"
      thumbnail_html <- sprintf('\n<div class="thumbnail">\n<a class="no-external" href="%s" %s>\n<p><img loading="lazy" src="%s" class="thumbnail-image"></p>\n</a>\n</div>', url, target, image)
    }
    
    cat(sprintf('
<div class="quarto-post%s" data-index="%d" data-categories="%s">%s
<div class="body">
<h3 class="no-anchor listing-title">
<a class="no-external" href="%s" %s>%s</a>
</h3>
<div class="listing-subtitle">
%s
</div>
<div class="listing-categories">
%s
</div>
</div>
<div class="metadata">
<a class="no-external" href="%s" %s>
<div class="listing-date">
%s
</div>
</a>
</div>
</div>\n', image_class, i-1, data_categories, thumbnail_html, url, target, title, subtitle, cats_html, url, target, date))
  }
}, error = function(e) NULL)
cat('</div>\n')
cat('</div>\n')

# 3. Open Source Contributions
cat('\n# Open source contributions\n\n')
cat('<div class="quarto-listing quarto-listing-container-default">\n')
cat('<div class="list quarto-listing-default">\n')
tryCatch({
  opensource <- read_json("www/open-source.json")
  for (i in seq_along(opensource)) {
    item <- opensource[[i]]
    url <- if (!is.null(item$url)) item$url else "#"
    title <- if (!is.null(item$title)) item$title else ""
    description <- if (!is.null(item$description)) item$description else ""
    date <- if (!is.null(item$date)) item$date else ""
    details <- if (!is.null(item$details)) item$details else ""
    image <- if (!is.null(item$image)) item$image else ""
    keywords <- if (!is.null(item$keywords)) item$keywords else list()
    
    data_categories_raw <- paste(keywords, collapse=",")
    data_categories <- jsonlite::base64_enc(URLencode(data_categories_raw, reserved=TRUE))
    
    cats_html <- ""
    for (cat in keywords) {
      escaped_cat <- gsub("'", "\\\\'", cat)
      cats_html <- paste0(cats_html, sprintf('<div class="listing-category" onclick="window.filterProjects(\'%s\'); event.preventDefault(); event.stopPropagation(); return false;" style="cursor:pointer;">%s</div>\n', escaped_cat, cat))
    }

    subtitle <- description
    if (details != "") subtitle <- paste0(subtitle, sprintf('<br><blockquote style="margin-top: 0.5rem; color: #666; border-left: 3px solid #ccc; padding-left: 1rem;">%s</blockquote>', details))
    
    target <- if (url != "#") 'target="_blank"' else ''
    
    thumbnail_html <- ""
    image_class <- ""
    if (image != "") {
      image_class <- " image-left"
      thumbnail_html <- sprintf('\n<div class="thumbnail">\n<a class="no-external" href="%s" %s>\n<p><img loading="lazy" src="%s" class="thumbnail-image"></p>\n</a>\n</div>', url, target, image)
    }
    
    cat(sprintf('
<div class="quarto-post%s" data-index="%d" data-categories="%s">%s
<div class="body">
<h3 class="no-anchor listing-title">
<a class="no-external" href="%s" %s>%s</a>
</h3>
<div class="listing-subtitle">
%s
</div>
<div class="listing-categories">
%s
</div>
</div>
<div class="metadata">
<a class="no-external" href="%s" %s>
<div class="listing-date">
%s
</div>
</a>
</div>
</div>\n', image_class, i-1, data_categories, thumbnail_html, url, target, title, subtitle, cats_html, url, target, date))
  }
}, error = function(e) NULL)
cat('</div>\n')
cat('</div>\n')
```

<script>
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    const grid = document.getElementById('projects-grid');
    const pillsContainer = document.getElementById('category-pills');

    window.filterProjects = function(category) {
      document.querySelectorAll('#category-pills .category-pill').forEach(pill => {
        if (pill.getAttribute('data-category') === category) {
          pill.classList.add('active');
        } else {
          pill.classList.remove('active');
        }
      });

      const gridItems = document.querySelectorAll('.g-col-1, .quarto-post');
      gridItems.forEach(item => {
        if (category === 'all') {
          item.style.display = '';
        } else {
          const itemCatsBase64 = item.getAttribute('data-categories');
          if (itemCatsBase64) {
            const itemCats = decodeURIComponent(atob(itemCatsBase64)).split(',');
            item.style.display = itemCats.includes(category) ? '' : 'none';
          }
        }
      });
    };

    if (pillsContainer) {
      pillsContainer.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
        if (e.target.classList.contains('category-pill')) {
          window.filterProjects(e.target.getAttribute('data-category'));
        }
      });
    }
  });
</script>
